candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue total; identical to Net sales in preview and valid as a revenue line.
Not revenue from core operations; other operating income component, so not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Credit losses and amortization of sales receivables
candidates.why: Expense line, not revenue.
Core sales/revenue line at the top of the income statement; preferred operating revenue label.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list with Net sales first as the most direct operating sales label; Total Revenue included as fallback label change.

candidates.why: Best aggregate direct-cost line under revenue; includes purchases, inventory change, and external services and functions as cost of sales.
Direct-cost component but only part of total direct production/service costs; inferior to aggregate Materials and Services.

candidates.why: Could be overhead or service delivery cost, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so not selected per hierarchy.
Overhead-related component, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so prefer only the SG&A row.
Named SG&A component but appears unpopulated in preview; explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Personnel-related but non-recurring and not preferred when explicit SG&A exists.
Possible overhead component, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Overhead bucket, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Explicit SG&A row and populated in preview; per rule select only this row.
Potential SG&A component, but appears only as supplemental/empty and explicit SG&A exists.

No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost total that includes interest and other items; useful fallback if dedicated interest line changes or is missing.
Dedicated interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Interest subcomponent only, not the main reported interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Foreign exchange losses and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Non-interest finance component, not suitable for XINT except in error.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income allocation line on the income statement, not balance-sheet book equity.
Comprehensive income attribution line, not balance-sheet equity.
Single equity component, not total owner equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line on the balance sheet; excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so inferior given separate MIB line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to avoid double counting with minority interest.

candidates.why: Income attribution line on the income statement, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Explicit balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; useful fallback/prioritized alternative label.
